title: centaurea atlantis
intro: Centaurea atlantis, also known as the Atlas Cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Centaurea atlantis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Centaurea atlantis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
